message:
feat(session): add snapshot persistence with validation and redaction

Implements versioned artifact envelopes with SHA-256 integrity checks
for inventory, inference, plan, and run metadata. Includes redaction
policies for sensitive command-line strings and atomic writes.

Closes process_triage-9k8.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
